text.title: Strategy Methods Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals (input fields, scores, thresholds) to a conclusion that references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Is strategic context clear enough to score methods?

conclusion.verdict: Halt; do not author the artefact.
Use SWOT as a quick framing.

example.trace: clear=true → market_maturity=high → Wardley chosen; coach paired in cycle 1.
